name: Comfiest Tentacle Pit of all time
description:
Most people nowadays when they fantasize about tentacles, they just wanna get thrown into a pit of them and get ravaged like no tomorrow by them.

The question is… why not the complete opposite? Instead of getting groped and gangbanged by tentacles, why not get held and cradled by them?

Sure, you can have some sweet sweet tentacle sex with them, but what if it’s done in a way where it didn’t feel wrong?

A few themes might pop up, but with such soft tentacles, there no way anything dangerous shows up aside from the obvious tentacle sex if you let it.
creator: Artuuuro
